plugins.name: cairn
plugins.description: Cairn — marks the trail and remembers the path. Wires the GSD planning workflow (/gsd:*) to the beads issue tracker (bd), optionally mirrors bd issues two-way (hub-and-spoke) to GitHub Issues, GitLab, Jira, Asana, and Azure Boards, and optionally makes the context-mode knowledge base intent-aware (scopes compressed memory to the active issue + phase). Activates only in repos that use both GSD and beads.
